productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Red Handbag
description: Utilitarian styling in the woven handles and metal rings perfectly combines with luxurious, quilted, silk-effect fabric to produce a one-of-a-kind bold red bag you'll wear with style. Made of blended fabric for durability Has one main zippered and magnetic closure compartment with internal organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials and an internal zipper pocket Two zippered compartments on the sides for additional space Two short, removable woven design handles in synthetic leather for carrying ease Quilted look with patent glossy panels Small metal legs at the base Metallic embelishment with brand name on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
